mainPoints.title: Returns
mainPoints.desc: We cannot accept returns of prescription products. All sales are final. If you think there was an error with your prescription medication, please contact info@conquer.com.

mainPoints.title: Insurance backed GLP-1 Policy
mainPoints.desc: The GLP-1 subscription can be cancelled at any time. If you are not a candidate or approved for GLP-1 medication, your subscription will be cancelled, and we will work with you to find another solution. The subscription fees already paid cannot be refunded, all sales are final.

mainPoints.title: Subscription policy
mainPoints.desc: Subscriptions to include hormone therapy, clomiphene, or enclomephene can be cancelled at any time. The subscription cannot be refunded, all sales are final.

mainPoints.title: Diagnostic labs policy
mainPoints.desc: All diagnostic lab sales and lab subscription sales are final and cannot be refunded.
